mapper.sql: AND ( COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(m.auth_type), ''), 'platform') = 'platform' OR ( m.auth_type = 'hospital' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM scm_hospital_user hu INNER JOIN scm_hospital_menu_auth hma ON hma.hospital_id = hu.hospital_id AND hma.menu_id = m.menu_id WHERE hu.user_id = #{userId} AND (hu.del_flag = '0' OR hu.del_flag IS NULL) ) ) OR ( m.auth_type = 'supplier' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM scm_supplier_user su INNER JOIN scm_supplier_menu_auth sma ON sma.supplier_id = su.supplier_id AND sma.menu_id = m.menu_id AND sma.hospital_id IS NULL WHERE su.user_id = #{userId} AND (su.del_flag = '0' OR su.del_flag IS NULL) ) ) OR ( m.auth_type = 'hospital_supplier' AND COALESCE(m.hospital_grant_supplier_flag, '0') <> '1' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM scm_supplier_user su INNER JOIN scm_supplier_menu_auth sma ON sma.supplier_id = su.supplier_id AND sma.menu_id = m.menu_id AND sma.hospital_id IS NULL WHERE su.user_id = #{userId} AND (su.del_flag = '0' OR su.del_flag IS NULL) ) ) OR ( m.auth_type = 'hospital_supplier' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM scm_hospital_user hu INNER JOIN scm_hospital_menu_auth hma ON hma.hospital_id = hu.hospital_id AND hma.menu_id = m.menu_id WHERE hu.user_id = #{userId} AND (hu.del_flag = '0' OR hu.del_flag IS NULL) ) ) OR ( m.auth_type = 'hospital_supplier' AND COALESCE(m.hospital_grant_supplier_flag, '0') = '1' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM scm_supplier_user su INNER JOIN scm_supplier_menu_auth sma ON sma.supplier_id = su.supplier_id AND sma.menu_id = m.menu_id INNER JOIN scm_hospital_supplier hs ON hs.supplier_id = su.supplier_id AND hs.hospital_id = sma.hospital_id WHERE su.user_id = #{userId} AND (su.del_flag = '0' OR su.del_flag IS NULL) AND hs.bind_status = '1' ) ) )

AND ( COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(m.auth_type), ''), 'platform') = 'platform' OR ( m.auth_type = 'hospital' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM scm_hospital_user hu INNER JOIN scm_hospital_menu_auth hma ON hma.hospital_id = hu.hospital_id AND hma.menu_id = m.menu_id WHERE hu.user_id = #{params.userId} AND (hu.del_flag = '0' OR hu.del_flag IS NULL) ) ) OR ( m.auth_type = 'supplier' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM scm_supplier_user su INNER JOIN scm_supplier_menu_auth sma ON sma.supplier_id = su.supplier_id AND sma.menu_id = m.menu_id AND sma.hospital_id IS NULL WHERE su.user_id = #{params.userId} AND (su.del_flag = '0' OR su.del_flag IS NULL) ) ) OR ( m.auth_type = 'hospital_supplier' AND COALESCE(m.hospital_grant_supplier_flag, '0') <> '1' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM scm_supplier_user su INNER JOIN scm_supplier_menu_auth sma ON sma.supplier_id = su.supplier_id AND sma.menu_id = m.menu_id AND sma.hospital_id IS NULL WHERE su.user_id = #{params.userId} AND (su.del_flag = '0' OR su.del_flag IS NULL) ) ) OR ( m.auth_type = 'hospital_supplier' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM scm_hospital_user hu INNER JOIN scm_hospital_menu_auth hma ON hma.hospital_id = hu.hospital_id AND hma.menu_id = m.menu_id WHERE hu.user_id = #{params.userId} AND (hu.del_flag = '0' OR hu.del_flag IS NULL) ) ) OR ( m.auth_type = 'hospital_supplier' AND COALESCE(m.hospital_grant_supplier_flag, '0') = '1' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM scm_supplier_user su INNER JOIN scm_supplier_menu_auth sma ON sma.supplier_id = su.supplier_id AND sma.menu_id = m.menu_id INNER JOIN scm_hospital_supplier hs ON hs.supplier_id = su.supplier_id AND hs.hospital_id = sma.hospital_id WHERE su.user_id = #{params.userId} AND (su.del_flag = '0' OR su.del_flag IS NULL) AND hs.bind_status = '1' ) ) )

select menu_id, menu_name, parent_id, order_num, url, target, menu_type, visible, is_refresh, ifnull(perms,'') as perms, icon, create_by, create_time, ifnull(auth_type,'platform') as auth_type, ifnull(default_open_scope,'none') as default_open_scope, ifnull(hospital_grant_supplier_flag,'0') as hospital_grant_supplier_flag from sys_menu
mapper.select:
select distinct m.menu_id, m.parent_id, m.menu_name, m.url, m.visible, m.is_refresh, ifnull(m.perms,'') as perms, m.target, m.menu_type, m.icon, m.order_num, m.create_time, ifnull(m.auth_type,'platform') as auth_type, ifnull(m.default_open_scope,'none') as default_open_scope, ifnull(m.hospital_grant_supplier_flag,'0') as hospital_grant_supplier_flag from sys_menu m left join sys_role_menu rm on m.menu_id = rm.menu_id left join sys_user_role ur on rm.role_id = ur.role_id LEFT JOIN sys_role ro on ur.role_id = ro.role_id where ur.user_id = #{userId} and m.menu_type in ('M', 'C') and m.visible = 0 and m.del_flag = '0' AND ro.status = '0'
order by m.parent_id, m.order_num

select distinct m.menu_id, m.parent_id, m.menu_name, m.url, m.visible, m.is_refresh, ifnull(m.perms,'') as perms, m.target, m.menu_type, m.icon, m.order_num, m.create_time from sys_menu m where m.menu_type in ('M', 'C') and m.visible = 0 and m.del_flag = '0' order by m.parent_id, m.order_num
where del_flag = '0' order by parent_id, order_num

select distinct m.menu_id, m.parent_id, m.menu_name, m.url, m.visible, m.is_refresh, ifnull(m.perms,'') as perms, m.target, m.menu_type, m.icon, m.order_num, m.create_time, ifnull(m.auth_type,'platform') as auth_type, ifnull(m.default_open_scope,'none') as default_open_scope, ifnull(m.hospital_grant_supplier_flag,'0') as hospital_grant_supplier_flag from sys_menu m left join sys_role_menu rm on m.menu_id = rm.menu_id left join sys_user_role ur on rm.role_id = ur.role_id LEFT JOIN sys_role ro on ur.role_id = ro.role_id where ur.user_id = #{userId} and m.del_flag = '0' AND ro.status = '0'
order by m.parent_id, m.order_num

select distinct m.perms from sys_menu m left join sys_role_menu rm on m.menu_id = rm.menu_id left join sys_user_role ur on rm.role_id = ur.role_id left join sys_role r on r.role_id = ur.role_id where m.visible = '0' and m.del_flag = '0' and r.status = '0' and ur.user_id = #{userId}
select distinct m.perms from sys_menu m left join sys_role_menu rm on m.menu_id = rm.menu_id where m.visible = '0' and m.del_flag = '0' and rm.role_id = #{roleId}

select concat(m.menu_id, ifnull(m.perms,'')) as perms from sys_menu m left join sys_role_menu rm on m.menu_id = rm.menu_id where rm.role_id = #{roleId} and m.del_flag = '0' order by m.parent_id, m.order_num

AND del_flag = '0'
AND menu_name like concat('%', #{menuName}, '%')
AND visible = #{visible}
order by parent_id, order_num

select distinct m.menu_id, m.parent_id, m.menu_name, m.url, m.visible, m.is_refresh, ifnull(m.perms,'') as perms, m.target, m.menu_type, m.icon, m.order_num, m.create_time, ifnull(m.auth_type,'platform') as auth_type, ifnull(m.default_open_scope,'none') as default_open_scope, ifnull(m.hospital_grant_supplier_flag,'0') as hospital_grant_supplier_flag from sys_menu m left join sys_role_menu rm on m.menu_id = rm.menu_id left join sys_user_role ur on rm.role_id = ur.role_id LEFT JOIN sys_role ro on ur.role_id = ro.role_id where ur.user_id = #{params.userId} and m.del_flag = '0' AND ro.status = '0'
AND m.menu_name like concat('%', #{menuName}, '%')
AND m.visible = #{visible}
order by m.parent_id, m.order_num
mapper.update: WITH RECURSIVE menu_tree AS ( SELECT menu_id FROM sys_menu WHERE menu_id = #{menuId} AND del_flag = '0' UNION ALL SELECT c.menu_id FROM sys_menu c INNER JOIN menu_tree t ON c.parent_id = t.menu_id WHERE c.del_flag = '0' ) UPDATE sys_menu m INNER JOIN menu_tree t ON m.menu_id = t.menu_id SET m.del_flag = '1', m.del_by = 'system', m.del_time = sysdate(), m.update_time = sysdate() WHERE m.del_flag = '0'
mapper.select: SELECT t.menu_id, t.parent_id, t.menu_name, t.order_num, t.url, t.target, t.menu_type, t.visible, t.is_refresh, t.perms, t.icon, t.remark, ifnull(t.auth_type,'platform') as auth_type, ifnull(t.default_open_scope,'none') as default_open_scope, ifnull(t.hospital_grant_supplier_flag,'0') as hospital_grant_supplier_flag, (SELECT menu_name FROM sys_menu WHERE menu_id = t.parent_id and del_flag = '0') parent_name FROM sys_menu t where t.menu_id = #{menuId} and t.del_flag = '0'
select count(1) from sys_menu where parent_id=#{menuId} and del_flag = '0'
where menu_name=#{menuName} and parent_id = #{parentId} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into sys_menu( menu_id, parent_id, menu_name, order_num, url, target, menu_type, visible, is_refresh, perms, icon, remark, create_by, auth_type, default_open_scope, hospital_grant_supplier_flag, create_time )values( #{menuId}, #{parentId}, #{menuName}, #{orderNum}, #{url}, #{target}, #{menuType}, #{visible}, #{isRefresh}, #{perms}, #{icon}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{authType}, #{defaultOpenScope}, #{hospitalGrantSupplierFlag}, sysdate() )
